name: pt_assets_process
query:
SELECT a.asset_id, a.name, a.image_name,
  CASE
    WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN s.alert = 2 THEN 1 END) > 0 THEN 2
    WHEN COUNT(CASE WHEN s.alert = 1 THEN 1 END) > 0 THEN 1
    ELSE 0
  END AS alert
FROM pt_assets_process a
LEFT JOIN pt_sensors_process s ON a.asset_id = s.asset_id
GROUP BY a.asset_id, a.name, a.image_name;
